description: This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Fedryen Swiftspear. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Recipe: Flask of Distilled Wisdom

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Recipe: Flask of Distilled Wisdom Phase 1 Item Level 60 Binds when picked up Requires Alchemy (300) Requires Cenarion Expedition - Exalted Use: Teaches you how to make a Flask of Distilled Wisdom. Sell Price: 1 Flask of Distilled Wisdom Item Level 60 Requires Level 50 Use: Increases Intellect by 65 for 2 hrs. Counts as both a Battle and Guardian elixir. This effect persists through death. (3 Sec Cooldown) Max Stack: 5 Sell Price: 50 Requires Dreamfoil (7), Icecap (3), Black Lotus , Crystal Vial This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Fedryen Swiftspear. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
